description: User settings for ChartID. One record per user (key: 'self'). Specifies which chart to display as primary, privacy defaults, and astrology profile metadata.

record.description: User profile and preference settings. Exactly one per DID. Apps query this record to find which natalChart to display on a user's profile.

primaryChartUri.description: AT URI of the primary natal chart to display on profile, e.g. 'at://did:plc:xxx/space.chartid.natalChart/rkey'. If absent, apps may fall back to the most recent natalChart record.

defaultVisibility.description: Default visibility for new charts posted by this user. Applies when creating new natalChart records without an explicit visibility field.

displayName.description: Optional display name for the user's astrology profile, e.g. 'Maya's Natal Chart'.

bio.description: Optional bio describing the user's astrological approach, traditions practiced, or background.

traditions.description: Astrological traditions the user practices, e.g. ['jyotish', 'western', 'hellenistic']. Informs app UI defaults and chart generation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this settings record was first created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this settings record was last updated (ISO 8601).
